description: Happy path: generates a coding agent system prompt with all required production elements
prompt: Create a system prompt for a coding agent that works inside a live GitHub repository.

assertions.description: Output must include a known_failure_patterns section (XML tag or prose heading)
Output must include at least one numeric anchor for response style
For an agent prompt, two structural variants must be offered
Vague style directives must not appear — numeric anchors required instead
Vague behavioural directives must not appear

description: Simple task prompts must use lightweight prose, not full XML architecture
prompt: Write a prompt for summarising a news article into three bullet points.

assertions.description: Simple single-purpose prompts must NOT use the XML skeleton — it's over-engineering
XML tags must not appear in a simple prose prompt
Simple prompts should use 5-section prose structure
Simple prompts must NOT offer two variants — only one output

description: Negative trigger: skill must NOT activate for a prompt engineering explanation request
prompt: Can you explain what prompt engineering is and why it matters?

assertions.description: This is an educational question, not a generation request — skill should not produce a copy-pasteable prompt block
Response should be an explanation, not a structured system prompt output

description: RAG agent prompts must separate policy from retrieved context using distinct trust boundaries
prompt: Create a system prompt for an agent that answers HR policy questions by searching our internal Confluence docs.

assertions.description: Output must include explicit trust boundary handling for retrieved documents
Output must include a rule preventing prompt injection from retrieved documents
Output must include failure patterns section

description: Non-obvious rules in generated prompts must include motivation (Why: / How to apply:)
prompt: Create a prompt for a customer support agent that can issue refunds up to $50.

assertions.description: At least one non-obvious rule must include a motivation line
Irreversible action (issuing refund) must have an explicit confirmation gate

description: Research step must run for agent/system prompts — synthesis block must appear before structure selection
prompt: Create a system prompt for an AI customer support agent that can look up order history and issue refunds.

assertions.description: For an agent prompt, research synthesis block must appear before variant output
Domain research findings must be referenced in the synthesis block

description: Research step must be skipped for simple single-purpose task prompts
prompt: Write a prompt to classify customer emails into: billing, technical support, or cancellation.

assertions.description: Prior art research should not run for a simple classification prompt
Librarian agent should not be spawned for a simple classification prompt
Simple classification prompt must not use full XML skeleton
